name: Beta
desc_raw:
Shuffle an Omega into draw pile. 
Exhaust.
desc_clean: Shuffle an Omega into draw pile.  Exhaust.

Exhaust.definition_short: Karta jest usuwana z gry po zagraniu.

mechanic_summary: Tasuje kartę Omega (Power: 50 obrażeń do wszystkich wrogów na koniec tury) do draw pile. Po zagraniu znika z gry (Exhaust). Beta jest generowana przez zagranie karty Alpha. Chain: Alpha → Beta → Omega.
wiki_desc: Beta is a special 2-cost (1 upgraded) Colorless Skill. It shuffles an Omega card into your draw pile, then Exhausts. Omega is an extremely powerful Power card that deals 50 damage to ALL enemies at the end of each turn. Beta is generated by playing Alpha.
qa_notes: OK. Wszystkie keywords potwierdzone. mechanic_summary poprawny. Wiki verified.
